title: Troomic sound tube
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Troomic sound tube''' was one of several [[Music/Legends|musical]] instruments that could be attached to a [[Bontormian klesplong/Legends|Bontormian klesplong]] to enhance the musical experience. This particular instrument was used to attach the Klesplong to a speaker.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-10-05 -->''[[Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]''
